name: Gundam Deathscythe
description:
Ashley Rose, she's an ace pilot and an amazing solider. She works diligently and thoroughly, and will follow orders no matter what. In her last mission she ran into you and your friend/partner in crime Alex. She managed to damage his cockpit enough for him to be put into a coma. Now your back for your revenge.

Ashley:

Her suit(if you let her live long enough to get inside it):

this is Alex:

Hope you guys enjoy the bot! again sorry for taking a while my internet was out but I should be good to keep working on more bots!
